hooks.command: fp=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$fp" | grep -qE 'data/(articles|models)\.json$'; then date_str=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); jq --arg d "$date_str" '.lastUpdated = $d' /home/cmc/git/grok/helloai/data/site.json > /tmp/_site_tmp.json && mv /tmp/_site_tmp.json /home/cmc/git/grok/helloai/data/site.json; fi 2>/dev/null || true
